productDisplayName: Puma Men Ducati Black Casual Shoes
description: These 65CC Ducati shoes from puma are a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes, inspired by sleek Ducati styling, are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSuede uppers with synthetic overlays for durability and protectionStitch detailing for added style and reinforcementLace-ups for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortCollar with built-up panel on the medial sideTextile lining for extra comfortMetal cat logo embedded on the tongue and cat logo embroidered on the heelDucati embroidered on the medial sideFormstripe
